creator: _jkrow
caption:
Save this for when you need to disappear for a weekend 🕯️ 

@mirbeauskaneateles feels like stepping into the French countryside…except it’s tucked away in Upstate New York.

It still kind of blows my mind that a place with this much of a French countryside vibe exists where it does. 

Mirbeau invited us right after we got back from a month abroad and it was EXACTLY what we needed. After weeks of sensory overload, our stay here felt like a full reset with long spa sessions, soaking in the hot tub, slow mornings with breakfast in bed and literally nowhere else to be. 

🥰 WHAT WE LOVED:

• The French garden style grounds that make you completely forget that you’re actually in New York

• The spa and its quiet spaces, saunas and treatments that feel so restorative 

• Slow mornings with coffee by the fire

• Evenings that revolved around aroma therapy, amazing food and unwinding

• The close proximity to all the cute little shops, restaurants and waterfront in Skaneateles

👉 Say ‘spa’ if you could use a little rest, pampering and mental reset in Upstate NY and I’ll send you the info 💆🏻‍♀️

——

✨ Follow for more adventures in Upstate NY & beyond
